title: Street Lights returns existing Limited Summons to original zones

card.rawText: Send all Limited Summons on the field back to where they were originally summoned from. Limited Summons cannot be played while this card is on the field.

effect.value: Send all Limited Summons on the field back to where they were originally summoned from. Limited Summons cannot be played while this card is on the field.

plan.title: Street Lights returns existing Limited Summons to original zones
plan.summary: Place Street Lights and verify all Limited Summons on field return to their original summon zones.

notes: Read text first: Send all Limited Summons on the field back to where they were originally summoned from. Limited Summons cannot be played while this card is on the field.
Seed or create an existing Limited Summon before resolving Street Lights.

steps: Place Street Lights as field magic.
Resolve the Limited Summon return effect.
Verify Limited Summons leave the field.

expectedAssertions.label: Street Lights limited summon return route logged

riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the deterministic headless route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Place Street Lights and verify all Limited Summons on field return to their original summon zones.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
